task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Audi S e-tron GT (Vehicle). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $125500.00 and wholesale is $85200.00. Product features: Electric sports sedan with dual motors and 238-mile range. Reference: https://www.audiusa.com/en/models/e-tron-gt/s-e-tron-gt/2025/overview/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Audi S e-tron GT. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Audi S e-tron GT. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
